text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from our outing, Winning Ticket
turns to me on the train station platform with a
serious look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Let's go on a journey! A trip with no
destination!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
For the thrill of adventure! It's not an adventure if
you know where you're going!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We'll set out for the unknown with nothing but a
one-way ticket in hand! Isn't that exciting?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You said you'd help me find new, exciting
experiences, right? I want us to do this together,
just the two of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Winning Ticket is still on her quest
for inspiration. First "Romance of the Three
Kingdoms," then futsal, and now a journey into
the unknown?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If that's what she's set her heart on, I'll follow
wherever it takes us.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, this train is so awesome! It shakes so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, what a cool bus! It mercilessly ignores
any bus stop without people!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
From here, we walk! Wooow, amazing! We can
travel without paying any money!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer! How are we gonna get back? I
really did only buy a one-way ticket, you know!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... you're right! I can't be worrying about
what happens next!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have money for the return journey, but let's not
mention that right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a long trek, we arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa... I really have no idea where we are!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm so blown away! This is it, Trainer! This is what travel is all about!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of amazing. There's nothing here. No
races, no academy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And yet, I'm alive! Trainer, you too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We can live, even without a purpose in life! Even
without races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's a little scary, but wow! This sure is a real
journey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taken aback by the unfamiliar setting, Ticket's
imagination runs wild. It seems like the new
experience is expanding her mind.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, listen... I've only got a tiny bit of money left.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I buy one last ticket, we'll be left stranded in
that place. So in that case...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Where do you think we should head? What
should our final destination be?
choice_data_list: Let's go as far as we possibly can.
Wherever you want to go the most.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: As far as we can...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've come this far, so I can't stop now! ALL
RIIIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we forge blindly onward without stopping to
think where we're heading. Until finally, we arrive
at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaay! It's the beach! We really did go as far as
we possibly could!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You were right! There's no point being
afraid—we've just gotta push on as far as we can!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woo-hooooo! I'm awesome! And now...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Farewell, everyone back home! Sniffle... I hope you'll never forget meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She came all this way, really believing she'd never
see her friends again.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
This is fine! I'll settle down here and fish for tuna
the rest of my life!
choice_data_list: No, let's go back. By taxi.
No, let's go back. By taxi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take my wallet out and show her the contents.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! How come you have that?! I thought
we were setting out with nothing but a one-way
ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Thank youuu! I'll pay you back, little by little!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears of joy run down her face. But it seems her
journey of no return has given her courage.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere unknown? Good point... We might've
come a long way, but at the end of the day, we're
still just somewhere in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's do iiiit! We gotta find somewhere way more
mysterious! Somewhere completely out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Forging wildly onward, we somehow arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, I think we've done it! This place is completely out there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can see the earth up there in the sky! And is it just me, or is the air here reeeeally thin?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My body feels really light, Trainer! Look! Boing,
boing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I've gotta try running like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishiiin! Listen to this! It's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I went to the moon yesterday! I mean, wooow! I
was a racer in space!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um, what?
choice_data_list: She fell asleep in the taxi home.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because of her own fantasies, it looks
like Winning Ticket is running a little faster.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Where I want to go the most... Yeah, you're
right...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I'll be stuck there, it has to be somewhere I
really want to go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go as far as we can by train, and then, after a
lot more walking, we arrive at...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We're here... Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The place where the Derby is held. 'Cause, you
know, this is my...
choice_data_list: This place has always been your goal.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! This is the only spot for me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day when I was inspired by the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
In my heart, I bought a one-way ticket to this
place a long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nothing's changed. I still want to be here! Even if
I could never leave, it'd be totally fine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's what I learned from this adventure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going on a journey means to reaffirm where you
belong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That seems to apply especially to Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is where our trip ends, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's continue our journey together—to come
here over and over again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when the Derby is over, there are many
other important races for her to run in here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her determination renewed, Winning Ticket
seems to be brimming with more power than ever.
